chunks.title: Universal Wickedness
chunks.reason: Describes the fool's declaration and God's observation of universal human corruption.

chunks.title: Judgment on Iniquity
chunks.reason: Rhetorical questions and declarations regarding the fate of evildoers and God's protection of the afflicted.

chunks.title: Hope for Restoration
chunks.reason: A concluding wish for Israel's salvation and joy upon God's restoration.
